description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish. The front features two vertically oriented doors, each with a transparent upper section and a woven or textured lower panel, likely for ventilation or decorative effect. The doors are fitted with small, round metallic handles for easy opening. Inside, there are multiple shelves visible through the upper glass or acrylic panels, suitable for storing books, dishes, or other household items. The sides and back are solid wood, with a simple, clean design and no additional ornamentation. The cabinet stands on four straight legs, elevating it slightly off the ground and giving it a modern, minimalist appearance.
description: A light wood cabinet with two front doors featuring transparent upper panels and woven lower sections, standing on four legs. It has visible shelves inside and metallic handles for access.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with transparent upper panels, woven lower panels, metallic handles, and visible interior shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back with a horizontal support bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel and no features.
